scripts.test: npm run test -w cli && npm run test -w app && npm run test -w desktop
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w cli && npm run test:coverage -w app && npm run test:coverage -w desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w cli && npm run typecheck -w app && npm run typecheck -w desktop
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w app && npm run build -w cli && npm run build -w desktop && npm run package -w desktop
